title: Pan-Seared Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish featuring crispy chicken, served with a side of steamed vegetables. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: tagine spices
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern stores

instructions: 1. Rinse the chicken breast and pat it dry with paper towels.
2. Season the chicken breast with salt and black pepper.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Sear the chicken breast for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
5. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set it aside to rest.
6. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
7. Add the tagine spices and sauté for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
8. Add the mediterranean olives and sauté for another minute.
9. Serve the chicken breast on top of the olive mixture and garnish with crispy xtra.
10. Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately.
